name: Vanilla Refrigerator Wafers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and margarine with powdered sugar until smooth.
2. Beat in the egg and vanilla extract.
3. Gradually mix in flour, baking soda, cream of tartar, and salt until combined.
4. Divide dough into two equal parts.
5. Form each part into a 2-inch round roll and wrap in waxed paper or aluminum foil.
6. Refrigerate or freeze rolls for at least 30 minutes to set.
7. Unwrap the chilled rolls and slice into 1/4-inch thick rounds.
8. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 8-10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
9. Cool on a wire rack.
Makes about 5 dozen cookies.
